forager.agents.message

Class MessageContent

  • java.lang.Object
    • forager.agents.message.MessageContent
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    CopulationOffer, LocationMessage, Reply, RequireFoodMessage, RessourceMessage

    public abstract class MessageContent
extends Object
    Content of message, all messages must be send with a subclas of this.
    Author:
    Guillaume Desquesnes

      AgentInfo sender
      Info on the sender.
      long timestamp
      Date of creation of the message.

    • Method Detail

      • isReply

        public boolean isReply()
        Test if the message is a reply. Default is false.
        Returns:
        True if it's reply, else false.

      • type

        public String type()
        Return the type of message send. The simple name of the class.
        Returns:
        The simple name of the class.
